queries: ("Diphosphonates"[Mesh] OR bisphosphonate*[tiab] OR diphosphonate*[tiab] OR alendronate[tiab] OR "alendronic acid"[tiab] OR risedronate[tiab] OR "risedronic acid"[tiab] OR ibandronate[tiab] OR "ibandronic acid"[tiab] OR "zoledronic acid"[tiab] OR zoledronate[tiab] OR clodronate[tiab] OR "clodronic acid"[tiab] OR pamidronate[tiab] OR "pamidronic acid"[tiab] OR etidronate[tiab] OR "etidronic acid"[tiab] OR tiludronate[tiab] OR neridronate[tiab] OR minodronate[tiab] OR Fosamax[tiab] OR Actonel[tiab] OR Boniva[tiab] OR Reclast[tiab] OR Zometa[tiab] OR Aclasta[tiab] OR Didronel[tiab] OR Aredia[tiab] OR Bonefos[tiab] OR Skelid[tiab]) AND ("Osteoporosis"[Mesh] OR osteoporos*[tiab] OR "Bone Diseases, Metabolic"[Mesh] OR osteopeni*[tiab])

(("Diphosphonates"[Mesh] OR bisphosphonate*[tiab] OR alendronate[tiab] OR risedronate[tiab] OR ibandronate[tiab] OR "zoledronic acid"[tiab] OR zoledronate[tiab] OR clodronate[tiab] OR pamidronate[tiab] OR etidronate[tiab] OR minodronate[tiab]) AND ("Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR cancer*[tiab] OR neoplasm*[tiab] OR malignan*[tiab])) AND ("Cohort Studies"[Mesh] OR "Case-Control Studies"[Mesh] OR "Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type] OR "Follow-Up Studies"[Mesh] OR cohort[tiab] OR prospective[tiab] OR retrospective[tiab] OR registry[tiab] OR database[tiab] OR "population-based"[tiab] OR nested[tiab])

(("Diphosphonates"[Mesh] OR bisphosphonate*[tiab] OR alendronate[tiab] OR risedronate[tiab] OR ibandronate[tiab] OR "zoledronic acid"[tiab] OR zoledronate[tiab] OR clodronate[tiab] OR pamidronate[tiab] OR etidronate[tiab] OR minodronate[tiab]) AND ((colorectal[tiab] OR colon[tiab] OR rectal[tiab]) AND (cancer*[tiab] OR neoplasm*[tiab] OR carcinoma*[tiab]) OR breast cancer[tiab] OR endometrial cancer[tiab] OR uterine cancer[tiab] OR liver cancer[tiab] OR hepatocellular[tiab] OR pancreatic cancer[tiab]) AND (risk[tiab] OR incidence[tiab] OR "odds ratio"[tiab] OR "risk ratio"[tiab] OR "relative risk"[tiab] OR "hazard ratio"[tiab])) NOT (metastas*[tiab] OR "bone metastas"[tiab] OR "skeletal related event"[tiab] OR "multiple myeloma"[tiab])

("Diphosphonates"[Mesh] OR "Etidronic Acid"[Mesh] OR "Alendronate"[Mesh] OR "Risedronic Acid"[Mesh] OR "Ibandronic Acid"[Mesh] OR "Zoledronic Acid"[Mesh] OR "Clodronic Acid"[Mesh] OR "Pamidronate"[Mesh] OR "Tiludronic Acid"[Mesh]) AND ("Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh] OR "Neoplasms/etiology"[Mesh] OR "Neoplasms/incidence"[Mesh] OR "Neoplasms/prevention and control"[Mesh] OR "Colorectal Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh] OR "Breast Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh] OR "Endometrial Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh] OR "Liver Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh] OR "Pancreatic Neoplasms/epidemiology"[Mesh])

inclusion_criteria: Original studies with a comparative design: cohort (prospective/retrospective), case–control (including nested case–control), or randomized controlled trials reporting cancer outcomes by bisphosphonate exposure status
Population of adults from the general population or patients treated for osteoporosis/other benign bone conditions, with participants at risk for incident cancer at baseline
Exposure defined as systemic bisphosphonate use (oral or intravenous; e.g., alendronate, risedronate, ibandronate, etidronate, zoledronic acid, pamidronate) compared with non-users of bisphosphonates

Reports effect estimates (RR, OR, HR) with 95% CI or sufficient data to calculate them for all-cause cancer or site-specific cancers (colorectal, breast, endometrial, liver, pancreatic), for incidence or mortality
exclusion_criteria: Non-comparative designs or non-original research: cross-sectional studies, ecological studies, case reports/series, reviews, editorials, comments, conference abstracts without full data, animal or in vitro studies

Populations with prevalent cancer at baseline or studies where bisphosphonates are used primarily for cancer treatment/prevention (e.g., metastatic bone disease) without separable estimates for cancer-free populations
Pediatric-only populations (<18 years) or highly specific non-representative subgroups not reflecting the general adult population with bisphosphonate use for benign bone conditions

Irrelevant exposure or outcome: unable to isolate bisphosphonate exposure from other antiresorptives (e.g., denosumab) or studies reporting only cancer recurrence/progression/survival without incident cancer or mortality risk
screening_criteria.description: Screening criteria to identify studies assessing the association between systemic bisphosphonate use and the risk of incident cancers (all-cause and colorectal, breast, endometrial, liver, pancreatic) compared with non-users in the general adult population.

included_articles.title: Protective effect of bisphosphonates on endometrial cancer incidence in data from the Prostate, Lung, Colorectal and Ovarian (PLCO) cancer screening trial.
Oral bisphosphonate use and risk of postmenopausal endometrial cancer.
A higher dosage of oral alendronate will increase the subsequent cancer risk of osteoporosis patients in Taiwan: a population-based cohort study.
Oral bisphosphonate use and colorectal cancer incidence in the Women's Health Initiative.
Reduced colon cancer incidence and mortality in postmenopausal women treated with an oral bisphosphonate--Danish National Register Based Cohort Study.
A prospective study of bisphosphonate use and risk of colorectal cancer.
Exposure to oral bisphosphonates and risk of cancer.
Exposure to bisphosphonates and risk of colorectal cancer: a population-based nested case-control study.
